---
title: "TextLabel.tsx"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\pennyone\vis\components\TextLabel.tsx"
loc: 32
complexity: 3
logic_score: 8.95
style_score: 4.13
intel_score: 3.25
overall_score: 4.39
---

## Intent
The `TextLabel.tsx` sector implements modular logic focusing on TextLabel, TextLabel, textRef, filename. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TextLabel, TextLabel, textRef, filename. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 8.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.1/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.3/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [useRef](file://react)
- [*](file://three)
- [useFrame](file://@react-three/fiber)
- [Text](file://@react-three/drei)
- [Node](file://../types/index.ts)

### Exports
- `TextLabel`
- `TextLabel`
- `textRef`
- `filename`
